Title: System Initialization
Definition: The system shall perform complete initialization sequence including hardware checks and software module loading within 30 seconds of power-on.

Title: Data Processing Rate
Definition: The main module shall process incoming data at a minimum rate of 1000 records per second under normal operating conditions.
Remarks: May require optimization for peak loads

Title: User Authentication
Definition: The system shall provide secure user authentication using username and password with optional two-factor authentication.

Title: Network Protocol
Definition: The system shall communicate with external devices using TCP/IP protocol with SSL/TLS encryption for all data transfers.
Remarks: Fallback to unencrypted for legacy devices

Title: Data Persistence
Definition: The application shall store configuration data in a relational database with automatic backup every 24 hours.

Title: Error Recovery
Definition: The system shall automatically recover from transient errors and log all error conditions to a centralized logging system.

Title: System Health
Definition: The monitoring subsystem shall continuously track CPU usage, memory consumption, and disk space utilization.

Title: External Integration
Definition: The system shall provide a RESTful API for external system integration with JSON data format and rate limiting.

Title: Data Backup Strategy
Definition: The system shall implement automated incremental backups with full backup weekly and retain data for 90 days minimum.
Compliance Notes: Incremental backups working, retention policy incomplete

Title: Load Balancing
Definition: The system architecture shall support horizontal scaling through load balancing to handle increased user demand.
